capnwasm snippets

Read-only snippets that show how generated readers and builders are called from TypeScript-flavoured code. Each tab runs the snippet against real Cap'n Proto bytes in your browser.

← Landing· Playground· Render bench· Snippets· Dynamic· OpenAPI· Wire inspector· Chat· Notes· vs capnweb

Not production-ready yet. These snippets show the current generated API, including safe readers backed by managed WebAssembly.Memory. The goal is production-capable ergonomics, but 0.0.x still needs hardening.

Generated API

reader.id
Direct getter. Good for one or two fields.
reader.draft(u => ...)
Batched projection. Good for render paths and sparse reads.
reader.toObject()
Materialize every field into plain JS.
UserBuilder.from(cpp, obj)
Edit/build bytes from plain JS, then reopen as a reader.
Snippet (read-only) 

      

    


    
Ready.
